unique_hook.angle: Top-10 are all generic 'stress relief + flowers/animals/mandalas/landscapes' — no differentiating angle in the keyword itself. A book published under this exact keyword will look identical to top-10 by title alone.

eliminations.details: qualitative_edge.unique_hook = FAIL. Top-10 are all 'stress relief + flowers/animals/mandalas/landscapes' clones. Our book under this exact keyword would be indistinguishable from top-10 by title alone. Sean Dollwet rule: #1 reason new books die in this niche is 'looks like every other book'. Underlying demand is real (avg 12,866/mo top-10 royalty, evergreen 12-15% growth), but generic entry has no path to differentiate. Pivot to a sharper subniche (specific theme, demographic, format twist) before launching.
Avg top-10 reviews = 1779; #1 has 7465 reviews, #3 has 4146 reviews. New entrant needs many months of ads spend to accumulate social proof to compete on the generic keyword.
